education.degree: AHAMMAD ANSARY CHARTERED ACCOUNTANT *Summary* To obtain a senior level position & develop a challenging career where I can make a meaningful contribution with deep credence & grow professionally Analytical Chartered Accountant known for high productivity and efficient task completion. Specialize in financial reporting, tax planning, and risk management. Excel in communication, problem-solving, and strategic planning. Ready to leverage skills to drive financial accuracy and business success. Hardworking cpa offering several years of experience working with private and public customers. Expertly manages accounting needs following optimal practices and current regulations. Brings wide-ranging knowledge of business and personal finances. *Skills* gst, taxation, tds, income tax, corporate tax, audit, statutory audit, internal audit, orensic audit, financial reporting, ifrs, gaap, accounts, transfer pricing *Experience* - *Tele Barta Ltd.* - Chartered Accountant - 12/2006 - Current - Income Tax & VAT related matters - Audit related matters - Compliance of RISC matters - Compliance of legal & regulatory issues - All types of reporting and correspondence - A largest PSTN company in Bangladesh - Collaborated with senior accountants to ensure compliance with accounting standards. - Supported audit processes by organizing documentation and responding to inquiries. - Communicated with clients regarding their financial statements and queries. - Assisted senior accountants in preparing financial statements and reports. - *Wbs company* - Chartered Accountant Assistant 9/2005 - 04/200 - Preparation of business plan - Monthly, quarterly and yearly forecasting - Budgeting - Financial and statistical analysis - Monthly, quarterly and yearly financial reporting - Adhoc reporting to Board and Management - A pioneer telecommunication company in Bangladesh - Prepared monthly bank reconciliations for multiple accounts. - Coordinated with external auditors during the annual audit process. - Verified accuracy of documents such as invoices, purchase orders. *Education and Training* Mhs Chartered Accounting *Job Experiences* - Manager, Corporate Affairs & Legal, Tele Barta Ltd., (a largest PSTN company in Bangladesh), Income Tax & VAT related matters, Audit related matters, Compliance of RISC matters, Compliance of legal & regulatory issues, All types of reporting and correspondence, 12/01/06, present - Manager - Finance, Data Edge Limited, (a leading ICT company in Bangladesh), Accounting system development, Development & testing of accounting software, Compliance of regulatory and company affairs, All types of financial reporting, 07/01/06, 09/30/06 - Deputy Manager - Finance, Grameenphone Limited, (a pioneer telecommunication company in Bangladesh), Preparation of business plan, Monthly, quarterly and yearly forecasting, Budgeting, Financial and statistical analysis, Monthly, quarterly and yearly financial reporting, Adhoc reporting to Board and Management, 09/01/05, 04/30/06
